Home.title: Eureka Lab
Home.subtitle: AI Literacy Platform for Kids — Coming Soon

Learn.chooseTemplateDesc: Pick a template to start with. You can customize the steps next.
Learn.customizeStepsDesc: Edit each step's prompt to make it your own.
Learn.testWorkflowDesc: Enter some text and run your workflow to see how each step works.
Learn.saveWorkflowDesc: Give your workflow a name and description so you can find it later.
Learn.workflowSavedDesc: Your workflow is ready to use. Great job building your own AI workflow!
Learn.chooseCodeTemplateDesc: Pick a template to start building. You can modify the code with AI.
Learn.aiPromptPlaceholder: Ask AI to modify your code...
Learn.agentKnowledgePlaceholder: What does your agent know about?
Learn.agentGoalsDesc: What should your agent help with?
Learn.agentGuardrailsDesc: What should your agent never do?
Learn.agentCreatedDesc: Your agent is ready to chat. Start testing it now!
Learn.chooseAgentTemplateDesc: Pick a template to start building your AI buddy.
Learn.noModules: No modules available at this level yet.
Learn.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Learn.title: Learn

Pricing.title: Choose Your Plan
Pricing.subtitle: Unlock more AI learning modules, higher prompt limits, and exclusive features for your child.
Pricing.footerNote: All plans include a 7-day free trial. Cancel anytime from your account settings.

Settings.title: Settings
Settings.noSubscription: You are on the Free plan.

Checkout.successMessage: Your plan has been upgraded. Enjoy your new features!
Checkout.cancelMessage: Your payment was canceled. No charges were made.

Admin.noSchools: No schools yet. Click "New School" to create the first tenant.
Admin.noAdmins: No admins yet. Add the first one.
Admin.suspendConfirm: Suspend this school? Its members lose access until reactivated.
Admin.adminCreatedTitle: Admin created — share these credentials now
Admin.adminCreatedNote: This password is shown once. Copy it before closing.

Teacher.noClassrooms: You haven't created any classrooms yet. Click "Create Classroom" to get started.
Teacher.noStudents: No students have joined this classroom yet. Share the join code with your students.
Teacher.removeStudentConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove this student from the classroom?
Teacher.deleteClassroomConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this classroom? This action cannot be undone.
Teacher.regenerateCodeConfirm: Are you sure you want to regenerate the join code? The old code will stop working.

Gamification.achievementsSubtitle: Track your learning journey, badges, and streaks.
Gamification.badge_firstWorkflowDesc: Create your very first AI workflow!
Gamification.badge_homeworkHeroDesc: Run the Homework Helper workflow 5 times.
Gamification.badge_workflowCustomizerDesc: Customize a template by editing its steps.
Gamification.badge_firstProjectDesc: Create your very first code project!
Gamification.badge_gameBuilderDesc: Build a game project using a game template.
Gamification.badge_aiCoderDesc: Use AI to generate code 10 times.
Gamification.badge_firstAgentDesc: Create your very first AI buddy agent!
Gamification.badge_personaMasterDesc: Create agents using all 3 starter templates.

Offline.bannerMessage: You are offline. Some features may be unavailable.
Offline.offlineDescription: Check your internet connection and try again.

MobileAi.title: AI Lab
MobileAi.subtitle: Ask me anything about AI — I'll help you learn!
MobileAi.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm your AI learning assistant. Ask me anything about prompts, workflows, or coding!
MobileAi.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
MobileAi.explainAi: What is AI and how does it work?
MobileAi.helpPrompt: Help me write a better prompt
MobileAi.checkWork: Check my work and give feedback
MobileAi.giveHint: Give me a hint for this activity
MobileAi.funFact: Tell me a fun AI fact

MobileProgress.title: My Progress
MobileProgress.teacherDescription: View detailed classroom progress in the full dashboard.

Notifications.pushDescription: Get reminders about streaks, badges, and progress.
Notifications.notSupported: Push notifications are not supported on this device.
Notifications.coppaNotice: Notification preferences for children are managed by parents.

AiAssistant.title: AI Assistant
AiAssistant.welcomeMessage: Hi! I'm your AI learning buddy. Ask me anything about AI, and I'll help you learn!
AiAssistant.learnHint: Give me a hint for this activity
AiAssistant.progressStreak: How do I keep my streak?
AiAssistant.aiExplain: What is AI and how does it work?
AiAssistant.aiPromptHelp: Help me write a better prompt
AiAssistant.aiFunFact: Tell me a fun AI fact

Install.title: Install Eureka Lab
Install.description: Get faster access and offline support by installing the app.

Phase16Welcome.heading: The Awakening
Phase16Welcome.subheading: Your quest for AI mastery begins here
Phase16Welcome.termsNotice: By entering this realm you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
Phase16Welcome.errorEmailInUse: That email sigil is already bound to another hero.
Phase16Welcome.errorInvalidEmail: The email sigil appears to be malformed.
Phase16Welcome.errorWeakPassword: Your secret rune must be at least 6 characters.
Phase16Welcome.errorUserNotFound: No hero found with that email sigil.
Phase16Welcome.errorWrongPassword: The secret rune you entered is incorrect.
Phase16Welcome.errorTooManyRequests: Too many failed attempts. Please wait before trying again.
Phase16Welcome.errorPopupClosed: The sign-in portal was closed. Please try again.
Phase16Welcome.errorNetwork: A network error occurred. Check your connection.
Phase16Welcome.errorUnexpected: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.

Phase16Character.heading: Forge Your Legend
Phase16Character.subheading: Choose your class and step into the realm

Phase16Character.errorSaveFailed: Failed to save character. Please try again.
Phase16Character.errorNetwork: A network error occurred. Please check your connection.

Phase16Dashboard.heading: Realm Map
Phase16Dashboard.subheading: The Four Isles of AI — choose your next conquest
Phase16Dashboard.footerNote: Defeat each isle's guardian to unlock the next realm
Phase16Dashboard.missionCountLine: {count} missions · Defeat the guardian to progress
Phase16Dashboard.lockedHint: Defeat the previous isle's guardian to unlock this realm

Phase16Settings.heading: Settings
Phase16Settings.uiModeDescription: Choose how the platform looks and feels.
Phase16Settings.modeNormalDescription: Clean, focused layout — ideal for studying without distractions.
Phase16Settings.modeGamifiedDescription: Fantasy adventure skin — earn KP, unlock gear, and battle AI zombies.
Phase16Settings.combatBlock: Cannot change UI mode during an active battle.
Phase16Settings.tenantLockNoticeBefore: Your organisation has locked the UI mode to
Phase16Settings.tenantLockNoticeAfter: . Contact your administrator to change this.
Phase16Settings.saveSuccess: Preference saved. Reload the page to apply the new mode.
Phase16Settings.saveError: Failed to save — please try again.

Phase16NotFound.heading: Consumed by the Void
Phase16NotFound.body: The path you seek has been consumed by the void. No realm, no isle, no passage remains where you tread. Perhaps the Anti-AI Overlord erased it from existence.
Phase16NotFound.footerNote: The journey is not over, hero.
